problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site may resolve Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
